title: Strategic Supply Planner (all genders)
required_skills: 3+ years of experience in planning, trading, analytics or similar role within a commercial environment (e.g. e-commerce, demand or supply planning, retail)
Strong commercial understanding of key performance drivers: margins, discounting, inventory dynamics
Highly analytical mindset with ability to translate data into clear business actions
Strong hands-on Excel skills; ability to independently analyse large and complex datasets
Practical experience with Power BI, SQL or similar tools for day-to-day work
Ability to structure problems, build business cases, and translate analysis into commercial recommendations
Strong stakeholder management skills with confidence to challenge and influence decision-making
Ability to operate in fast-paced environment with multiple planning cycles
bonus_skills: Experience in demand or supply planning specifically
matched_skills: Power BI (PL-300 certified) — satisfies Power BI tool requirement
Strong Excel skills — satisfies Excel requirement
Strong stakeholder management: multi-workstream coordination at HSBC, cross-functional interface at Hapag-Lloyd — satisfies stakeholder management requirement
Analytical mindset: KPI dashboards, budget variance analysis, data storytelling at HSBC — partially satisfies analytical mindset requirement
E-commerce background (Moli Media, GRG Banking, ECE Group) — weakly satisfies commercial environment experience requirement
Business case structuring: competitive intelligence, market analysis at ECE Group — very partial match
missing_skills: No demand planning or supply planning experience whatsoever
No inventory management or stock level analysis experience
No experience with margins, discounting structures, or intake/supply KPIs in a retail context
No SQL skills — explicitly listed as required tool proficiency
No forecasting, budgeting, or reforecasting in a retail/trading context
No fashion, luxury, or off-price retail industry knowledge
No experience with trading performance analysis or scenario analysis for commercial planning
core_responsibilities: Own and drive end-to-end planning cycle including annual budgeting, monthly reforecasts, and weekly performance tracking
Ensure alignment between top-down targets and bottom-up plans; identify gaps and drive corrective actions
Analyse trading and supply performance; translate data into actionable recommendations for growth, profitability, and inventory health
Deliver accurate forecasts across key supply KPIs (intake, discounting, margins, inventory levels)
Drive short-term and long-term planning decisions through scenario analysis and performance insights
Partner with division teams to challenge assumptions and improve forecast quality
Continuously improve planning frameworks, tools and processes
recommended_emphasis: This role is not suitable for this candidate — do not apply
Supply planning is a domain-specific discipline requiring experience with demand forecasting, inventory dynamics, and retail trading KPIs — none of which are in the candidate's background
The Power BI certification is a genuine asset but insufficient to compensate for the planning domain and SQL gaps
The role requires operating in weekly/monthly trading cycles with commercial targets — fundamentally different from programme governance
summary: Poor match at 26.9%. This is a supply chain planning role requiring 3+ years of demand/supply planning, trading analytics, or retail inventory management experience alongside SQL skills and commercial retail KPI knowledge. While the candidate's Power BI certification and analytical background provide partial tool-level alignment, the core domain expertise in supply planning and retail trading is entirely absent. Not recommended for application.
